name: Single zone internal gains cooling smoke case
source: Offline committed reference fixture placeholder; real EnergyPlus model/output to be added in a future validation milestone.
purpose: Prepare comparative validation fixture structure for sensible internal gains cooling behavior; not exact EnergyPlus parity and not ASHRAE 140 certification.
notAClaim: Does not claim exact EnergyPlus numerical parity.
Does not claim ASHRAE 140 validation coverage.
Does not claim full ISO 52016 node/matrix solver parity.
Does not claim latent or moisture validation coverage.
weatherSource: Constant mild outdoor temperature synthetic fixture.

geometry.description: Single-zone rectangular box with no windows.

envelope.description: Simple envelope with low transmission load.

internalGains.description: Fixed sensible internal gains schedule; no latent gains.

hvacControl.description: Ideal cooling load, fixed cooling setpoint.

expectedEngineeringBehavior: Cooling load increases with sensible internal gains.
Heating load remains zero or same-sign neutral for this mild cooling case.
Latent and moisture effects are out of scope.
knownDifferences: AssistantEngineer internal gains are sensible-only in v1.
Latent heat and humidity are intentionally out of scope.
Detailed EnergyPlus heat storage/distribution behavior is not claimed.
